response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content, which consists of a series of static images showing fan messages and concert-related information screens. 2. Listened to the audio throughout the entire duration and confirmed it is a continuous, instrumental background track with no vocals. 3. Defined chronological scenes based on the major visual transitions in the video. 4. Since no vocal music is present, all song-related metadata and lyric fields were set to null.
response.global_summary: A video displaying a collection of fan messages for the Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina'nis 1st concert 'Drawn to Dawn', along with information screens about the concert's starting time, venue regulations, and merchandise sales. The entire video is accompanied by continuous instrumental background music.

scenes.description: A screen displaying various fan messages for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert.
A screen stating that the concert will be starting soon, featuring illustrations of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis.
An 'Attention' screen for visitors, displaying information about lighting and cheering regulations.
A screen displaying the '2nd Round of Concert Merch Sales', detailing various items available for purchase.
A continuation of screen displays showing more fan messages for the concert.
